nav_order.title: Menu Item Order
nav_order.description: Use the arrow buttons to reorder the sidebar navigation items on the forum index page. Changes take effect immediately after saving.
nav_order.no_items: No navigation items detected yet. Visit the forum index page as an admin first to populate this list.
nav_order.icon_input_title: Custom Font Awesome icon class (e.g. fas fa-bolt). Leave empty to use default.
nav_order.highlight_color_help: Background color for highlighted nav items. Leave empty to use the default theme color.
nav_order.flip_label: Flip navigation (show tags above menu items)
nav_order.flip_help: When enabled, tag links appear at the top of the sidebar and navigation items (All Discussions, Following, etc.) appear below.
nav_order.sticky_label: Sticky sidebar (sidebar stays visible while scrolling)
nav_order.sticky_help: When enabled, the sidebar including the Start a Discussion button stays fixed at the top of the viewport as you scroll down.
